title: GEAR: Guided End-to-End AutoRegression for Image Synthesis
innovation_summary: GEAR: Guided End-to-End AutoRegression for Image Synthesis: We present GEAR (Guided End-to-end AutoRegression), which trains a vector-quantized (VQ) tokenizer and an autoregressive (AR) generator jointly and end-to-end, guided by representation alignment.
why_it_matters: Overall signal 89/100 driven by novelty 89 and practical impact 94.
